Para ti · a guide for the whole of you

Meet Zuly — the guide who knows your whole life, and turns it into a day you can actually do.

Your whole growth — meditation, healing, your body, your relationships, your work, your money — held by one warm guide who's always in your corner.

Join the waitlist See how she works

✦ Private by design. What you tell Zuly stays yours.

Z
Buenos días, mija
Tuesday · a lighter day
"Let's protect your morning before the noise. One small thing, just for you."
◈ Morning · MeditationWeek 2 / 8
5-min grounding
Before you open your inbox
Name one thing you're proud of
✦ A 2-min reflection →
◉Hey Zuly… tell me what's on your heart
TodayTalkPlanGrowYou

You're carrying a lot. Zuly carries it with you.

Not another app that adds to your list. A guide who takes in your whole life — the inner work and the world around it — and helps you grow through it, one day at a time.

The four pillars

Real frameworks, not vibes.

Zuly starts with a conversation, then guides you through the pillars that fit your season — each grounded in what actually works.

01

Meditation

Grounding, breath, and calm you can keep — short daily practice that fits a real life.

Built on MBSR / MBCT
02

Self-healing

Journaling, reframing, and self-compassion to move through what's heavy — with Zuly to talk to.

CBT & expressive writing
03

Physical wellness

Movement that builds over weeks, not punishes — paced to your body and your goals.

Progressive, periodized
04

Life guidance

Relationships, work, money, self — small guided principles that compound into change.

Habit & behavior design

How she works

A relationship, not a content library.

The more Zuly knows, the more she can hold. It's a loop that gets warmer the longer you're in it.

1

Talk to her

Share your goals, your day, what's weighing on you.

2

She learns your life

Your pillars, your rhythms, what matters right now.

3

She builds your day

A custom routine — small practices that move you forward.

4

Your calendar fills

Your practices land where they belong, in weekly tracks.

5

She checks in

Always there for a nudge, a reframe, or a plan.

Hey Zuly — I keep starting things and never finishing. I feel stuck. 😩
ZulyThat's not failure, mija — it's a pattern, and patterns can change. Let's make this week about finishing one small thing you're proud of. Gentle, no pressure.✦ Start here: one small win
okay i'd like that
ZulyEso es. I'll check in with you tomorrow morning, right after your coffee. You're already moving, mija.

Say "Hey Zuly"

She grows with you.

Tell her what's alive for you — a goal, a fear, a win, what happened today — and she turns it into your next step forward.

  • ✦
    Say it out loud. A dream, a worry, something you're proud of — share whatever's on your heart, by voice or text.
  • ◆
    One step, not a pile. She points you to the one thing that moves you forward — never a wall of shoulds.
  • ◈
    She carries the weight. Reflects it back, finds the practice, and weaves it gently into your days.
  • ♥
    Never pushy. Zuly meets you where you are. You set the pace — she just keeps showing up for you.

Wherever you are

Text her like a friend — it's all still here.

Zuly isn't trapped in an app. Reach her the way you already talk. However you message her, it lands in one private thread you'll always find in the app.

In the app

Most private

Your deepest conversations, fully encrypted. The safe place for the real things.

End-to-end encrypted
On WhatsApp

Like a voice note to a friend

Chat or send a voice note from wherever you are. Warm, familiar, encrypted.

Voice & chat
By text

Quick capture, anywhere

"Hey Zuly, add milk" or a morning check-in — no app to open. Perfect for the small stuff.

Your own private number

Every number is yours alone, verified to your account — so your thread stays private to you. We're always honest about which channels are encrypted and what that means.

Change you can feel — in weeks, not downloads.

Your pillars become 4- and 8-week tracks with a beginning, a middle, and a you-at-the-end. It's a program that moves you forward, not a shelf of a thousand meditations you'll never open.

Trust

You'll tell her real things. We treat that seriously.

Yours to keep, yours to delete

Real deletion, not buried settings. Your words, your call.

We collect the minimum

Only what Zuly needs to guide you — nothing sold, nothing harvested.

Honest about what leaves your phone

Plain language on where anything goes. No surprises, ever.

Support, not a diagnosis

Zuly is a wellness guide, not a therapist — and she'll always point you to real help when it matters.

Z

From Zuleidy

"Zuly is my real name. I built her for the woman I used to be — the one starting over, rebuilding herself piece by piece, doing it on her own terms."

Born in Cali, raised in Madrid, made in the in-between — I know what it is to reinvent yourself more than once. Zuly is the guide I wished I'd had: warm, honest, and completely in your corner as you rise.

— Lupe "Zuly" Fuentes

Be first to meet Zuly.

We're opening early access soon. Leave your email and we'll bring you in — gently, one step at a time.

Monthly membership at launch · no spam, just a hello when it's time.

HeyZuly Zuly is a wellness guide, not medical, therapeutic, or financial advice. © 2026 · heyzuly.com
